content_body: Above the Timberline was a beautiful home and a lovely stay in every way. The service was exceptional - answering all of our questions about where to go and what to do! Listening to summer storms while sitting by the fire after a long day on the river all while soaking in the mountain views was magical. The home was spacious, and we utilized every feature - the grill, the jacuzzi, the pool table, the gas stove in the kitchen, al fresco dinners overlooking the mountains, and even epic Mrs. Pac-man battles on the arcade game. Thanks for a wonderful time away!
title: Exceptional!
